question: According to Meta's 2022 carbon footprint table on page 10, what are the three scopes of emissions and their respective percentages and metric tons of CO2e? Which category within Scope 3 is the largest?
answers: Scope 1 accounts for 1% (66,934 mt CO2e), Scope 2 accounts for less than 1% (273 mt CO2e), and Scope 3 accounts for 99% (8,466,264 mt CO2e). Within Scope 3, Capital Goods is the largest category at 63% (5,346,583 mt CO2e), followed by Purchased Goods & Services at 30% (2,545,466 mt CO2e).
Scope 1: 1% (66,934 mt CO2e), Scope 2: <1% (273 mt CO2e), Scope 3: 99% (8,466,264 mt CO2e). Largest Scope 3 category: Capital Goods at 63% (5,346,583 mt CO2e).
